stl_constraints.natural_language: The black bowl between the plate and the ramekin will be picked up.

predicate_definitions.grasped: true if the robot has grasped the black bowl between the plate and the ramekin at time t.

stl_constraints.natural_language: The black bowl between the plate and the ramekin will be placed on the plate.

predicate_definitions.placed_on: true if the black bowl between the plate and the ramekin is placed on the plate at time t.

_meta.task_description: pick up the black bowl between the plate and the ramekin and place it on the plate
